description: Lightweight verification of CPU governor fix
command: echo '=== CPU Governor ===' && cat /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu0/cpufreq/scaling_governor; echo '=== cpufrequtils status ===' && systemctl is-active cpufrequtils; echo '=== Ollama version ===' && ollama --version; echo '=== Ollama list ===' && ollama list; echo '=== Load Average ===' && cat /proc/loadavg
